name: Point-Set Topology — Part 4: Countability & Metrization
description: Countability axioms, separability, Lindelöf, metrization, Tychonoff, Baire category, Arzelà-Ascoli, Stone-Weierstrass.
mermaid:
graph TD
    DefFirstCount["Def: First countable: countable local base"]
    DefSecondCount["Def: Second countable: countable base"]
    DefSeparable["Def: Separable: countable dense subset"]
    ThmSecSep["Thm: Second countable ⇒ separable"]
    ThmLindelof["Thm: Second countable ⇒ Lindelöf"]
    DefLindelof["Def: Lindelöf: every open cover has countable subcover"]
    DefMetrizable["Def: Metrizable"]
    ThmUrysohnMet["Thm: Urysohn metrization: compact Hausdorff 2nd countable ⇒ metrizable"]
    ThmTychonoff["Thm: Tychonoff: product of compact is compact"]
    ThmBaire["Thm: Baire category: complete metric space"]
    ThmArzAsc["Thm: Arzelà-Ascoli: equicontinuous + pointwise bounded"]
    ThmStoneWeier["Thm: Stone-Weierstrass: dense subalgebra in C(X)"]
    LemProd2nd["Lem: Countable product of 2nd countable is 2nd countable"]
    CorCompactMet["Cor: Compact metric ⇒ separable"]
    LemSeqClosure["Lem: In 1st countable, x ∈ cl(A) iff seq in A → x"]
    DefFirstCount --> DefSecondCount
    DefSecondCount --> ThmSecSep
    DefSecondCount --> ThmLindelof
    DefSecondCount --> LemProd2nd
    ThmLindelof --> DefLindelof
    ThmSecSep --> CorCompactMet
    DefSecondCount --> ThmUrysohnMet
    RefCompact["Compact (Part 2)"]
    RefHausdorff["Hausdorff (Part 3)"]
    RefCompact --> ThmUrysohnMet
    RefHausdorff --> ThmUrysohnMet
    LemProd2nd --> ThmTychonoff
    RefCompact --> ThmTychonoff
    DefFirstCount --> LemSeqClosure
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lemma fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef corollary fill:#1abc9c,color:#fff,stroke:#16a085
    classDef ref fill:#bdc3c7,color:#333,stroke:#95a5a6
    class RefCompact,RefHausdorff ref
    class DefFirstCount,DefSecondCount,DefSeparable,DefLindelof,DefMetrizable definition
    class LemProd2nd,LemSeqClosure lemma
    class ThmSecSep,ThmLindelof,ThmUrysohnMet,ThmTychonoff,ThmBaire,ThmArzAsc,ThmStoneWeier theorem
    class CorCompactMet corollary
